title: City of Spearfish - Snow Removal Subscription Service
description: Applications for the Snow Removal Subscription Service are now available. Stop by City Hall or call Public Works at 605-642-1333 to learn more about the program and get an application.

title: City of Spearfish - Weather & Roads
description: Staff are monitoring weather and road conditions. If warranted, snow removal crews will be dispatched as early as 4:00 AM Wednesday. Operations will focus on Priority 1 and Priority 2 routes to ensure main travel corridors are cleared.

title: City of Spearfish - Winter Weather - Friday April 3rd
description: Winter weather is expected on Friday. Plow operators will be dispatched as needed in the morning & throughout the day.  Crews will focus on Priority 1 & 2 routes and then move to Priority 3 routes if necessary.
